title: Shell row leading icon + solid-black background (D3/D4)
action: Implement D3 in renderShellRow (web/src/views/switcher.ts:209-222): add a leading (leftmost, in-flow) small monochrome SVG icon inside a `<span class="shell-icon" aria-hidden="true">` wrapper, representing a shell/terminal glyph -- visually distinct from `.agent-watermark`'s large faded background-letter treatment (styles.css:502-514), sized like the existing header icon buttons (~20px), colored with an existing neutral/muted text token (not kindAccentColor, since shells carry no kind per D3). Implement D4 by adding a `.shell-row` CSS rule in styles.css that overrides background to solid black -- the `.shell-row` class already exists in the rendered markup (switcher.ts:214, `class="agent-card shell-row"`) so only a new CSS rule is needed, layered on top of the shared `.agent-card` rule (styles.css:454-463) which itself must stay untouched so agent cards keep `--bg-elevated`. Match whichever black-value convention (literal hex vs a new named CSS variable) the existing color tokens in styles.css already follow. In web/test/switcher.test.ts's existing `describe("renderSwitcher shell rows (D1/D2/D5/D6/D7)", ...)` block, add a test asserting a rendered shell row's markup contains an element matching `.shell-icon`.

truths: A rendered shell row contains a leading `.shell-icon` element distinct from the agent watermark treatment
A rendered shell row's background is solid black via a `.shell-row` CSS rule, independent of --bg-elevated
A rendered agent card's background is unchanged (--bg-elevated, .agent-card rule untouched)

artifacts.substantive: a `.shell-row` rule overriding background to solid black; `.agent-card` rule itself untouched

key_links: renderShellRow's `.shell-icon` element appears leftmost in the shell row's rendered markup
prohibitions: No change to `.agent-card`'s own background rule
No use of kindAccentColor for the shell icon

verify: cd web && grep -q 'shell-icon' src/views/switcher.ts && grep -q 'shell-row' src/styles.css && grep -q 'shell-icon' test/switcher.test.ts && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run switcher.test.ts

trace.outcome: Added leading .shell-icon SVG glyph to renderShellRow (D3) and .shell-row solid-black CSS override (D4); .agent-card rule untouched
trace.verify_output: grep checks passed; tsc --noEmit clean; vitest: Test Files 1 passed (1), Tests 20 passed (20), Duration ~816ms
trace.verify_command: cd web && grep -q 'shell-icon' src/views/switcher.ts && grep -q 'shell-row' src/styles.css && grep -q 'shell-icon' test/switcher.test.ts && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run switcher.test.ts
